keyPoints: 6.1: Operating System Concepts - Definition, Characteristics, Types
6.2: Process Management - Process, Threads, Scheduling Algorithms
6.3: Memory Management - Virtual Memory, Paging, Segmentation
6.4: File Management - File Structure, File Systems, File Operations
6.5: Input/Output Management - Input/Output Devices, Input/Output Systems
6.6: Security and Protection - Process Protection, Memory Protection
